## Compliance Context

**Primary compliance requirement(s):**
- [ ] HIPAA
- [ ] GDPR / EU AI Act
- [ ] PCI-DSS
- [ ] FDA SaMD (Software as a Medical Device)
- [ ] EU MDR (Medical Device Regulation)
- [ ] Other (please specify below)

**Other compliance requirements:**

**Is data egress from the device a hard requirement constraint?**
- [ ] Yes — model inputs must not leave the device
- [ ] No — data egress is acceptable with contractual coverage
- [ ] Undecided / currently evaluating

## Use Case

**Brief description of the AI use case:**
<!-- What decision does the model make? Who acts on the explanation? What is the consequence of a wrong decision? -->

**How is interpretability currently handled (if at all)?**
<!-- e.g. "No interpretability in production", "Remote SHAP server", "Manual review without explanations" -->

**What outcome would a successful pilot demonstrate?**
<!-- e.g. "Explanation latency under 50ms on our device fleet", "Audit log satisfies HIPAA audit control requirement", "QSA accepts on-device design as PCI-compliant" -->

---
